title: Ascendency Path of SkillShot
atAGlance: A precision path that trades your own lifeforce for impossible shots and mutual kill pressure.
sageNotes: SkillShots are feared because they do not bluff. They pin fate to a single line and accept that the recoil may break them too. Veterans describe this path as a duelist's pact at range: if the target falls, the shooter may fall with them, and both sides know it before the trigger is pulled.
gameInformation: Designed for ranged burst with explicit self-costs. Signature effects should convert HP, hit dice, or exhaustion pressure into shot quality, while major finishers can force mirrored consequences on both shooter and target. Keep mutual-destruction payoffs dramatic but limited to avoid trivializing boss pacing.
